core_mechanism: minimization of an effective potential in which a non-local interaction term destabilizes the spatially-uniform state and selects a finite-wavelength periodically-modulated (stripe) ground state — spontaneous breaking of a continuous translational symmetry into a spatially periodic pattern
brief_reason: The abstract reports spontaneous breaking of translational invariance, analyzed via effective-action techniques, producing a stripe (periodically modulated) phase driven by the non-local nature of the dynamics, which is the signature of a non-local energy functional favoring a finite-wavelength modulation over a uniform state.
